---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, recipe, layer, or UX improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature, triage
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Before you file: skim the ROADMAP.md to see if this lives in Now / Next /
Soon / Future already. If it does, a +1 there is more useful than a new issue.
-->

## Feature summary

<!-- One sentence describing what you'd like Fantasy Studio to do. -->

## Problem this solves

<!--
Describe the problem, not the solution. What can't you do today? What did
you try that didn't work? Concrete prompts / use cases beat abstract goals.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How could this work? UX flow, new recipe shape, new layer type, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why didn't those work? Even rejected
alternatives are useful — they show the design space you've thought through. -->

## Roadmap alignment

<!--
Where on the roadmap (https://github.com/bgrut/fantasy-studio/blob/main/ROADMAP.md)
does this fit? Examples:

- [ ] Now (V1.0 launch — Mid-May 2026)
- [ ] Next (V1.1 – V1.4 post-launch)
- [ ] Soon (V1.5 – V1.9, ~3-6 months)
- [ ] Future (V2.0+, ~6-12 months)
- [ ] Eventual (V3+)
- [ ] Off-roadmap — let's discuss
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Mockups, sketches, screenshots from other tools that do this well, links
to related discussions, examples of prompts that would benefit. Anything
that helps me understand what good looks like.
-->
